title: YouTube might be suppressing my channel, commenters get deleted.

enrichment.summary: Kyle suspects YouTube and Google are suppressing his channel by deleting comments from fans and their entire accounts shortly after posting. He shares specific examples of commenters whose channels vanish within hours, contrasts this with his belief that right-wing creators get artificially boosted, and notes he was demonetized and never received ad revenue despite analytics showing earnings.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Believes YouTube is removing positive comments and deleting fan accounts to suppress his channel
Suspects creators like Ben Shapiro and Steven Crowder are artificially boosted by Silicon Valley connections
Feels Google has denied him earned revenue and demonetized him unfairly
Identifies as anti-industry and believes content should be free, which may be why platforms dislike him
